body_txt: Something about a kid being present brings out the best in people. Even a hard-boiled, foul-mouthed sailor will go the extra mile to clean up his act when a little kid is in the room. Okay, it's not so much the best as embarrassment about the worst, but it suffices. Like when you stuff all your clutter in a bag and throw that bag in the shed when your relatives visit unexpectedly. Of course, the reason for the censor doesn't have to be a kid. Sometimes it's the Team Mom , sometimes an authority figure, or a Morality Pet of some other kind. The difference between this and Think of the Censors! is that the latter involves Breaking or at least Leaning on the Fourth Wall , whereas this is justified in-universe. Supertrope to Curse Cut Short and Censorship by Spelling . Y cuando se utilizan otras lenguas para ocultar la verdad a los niños . This may be a reason for the Swear Jar . It's also why characters Cover Innocent Eyes and Ears . This is, of course, Truth in Television . See also Not in Front of the Parrot! . Sub-Trope of Little Brother Is Watching .
